name: io.github.benswork-space/canido
description: Regulatory intelligence API for AI agents — look up what permits, licenses, and regulations apply for food service businesses (food trucks, restaurants, catering, cottage food) in Austin TX, San Francisco CA, and New York City NY.

environmentVariables.name: CANIDO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your CanIDo API key. Get a free one at https://canido-api-production.up.railway.app (10 queries/month free tier).

environmentVariables.name: CANIDO_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API URL (defaults to production). Useful for self-hosted deployments.
